close_reason: Added 'unless Code.ensure_loaded?(MockRepo)' guards to bedrock_hca and bedrock_directory test_helper.exs files. No more redefinition warnings in test suite.
description: MockRepo is defined in bedrock_core, bedrock_hca, and bedrock_directory test_helper.exs files. When umbrella tests run, this causes 'redefining module MockRepo' warnings. Need to guard the defmock calls or use unique names.
title: Fix MockRepo redefinition warnings in test suite
